name: Pipeline Cards
description: Grid of numbered step cards showing a sequential process or pipeline. Each card features a colored numbered badge, step name, description, and optional visual content area. Cards rotate through a color palette (coral, amber, cyan, green, yellow, orange, purple) with colored border strokes and matching heading colors. Ideal for process visualization, methodology breakdowns, and feature walkthroughs.

outlined.description: Cards with colored border stroke (3px solid), transparent background, and accent top bar. Each card gets a unique color from a rotating palette. Number badge is a filled circle with the step number in monospace. Step name uses the card's accent color. Description is muted white. Optional visual content area inside the card has a subtle tinted background. On hover, card lifts with translateY(-4px) and gains a colored box-shadow. Last card centers if odd count. 2-column grid layout.

slots.step-number: Badge circle: _inline-flex _items[center] _justify[center] _w8 _h8 _rounded[50%] _mono _fs[0.8rem] _fw700 _mb3. Background uses the card's accent color, text is dark. Displays the step number (1, 2, 3...).
slots.step-name: Step heading with _fs[1.15rem] _fw700 _mb2. Color matches the card's accent color from the rotation palette.
slots.step-description: Step body text with _fs[0.85rem] _lh[1.6] _mb4 _fgwhite/75. Brief description of what happens in this step.
slots.step-visual: Optional inner content area with _rounded[10px] _p3 and subtle tinted background matching the card's accent color at ~7% opacity. Can contain: chat bubbles, tag lists, code snippets, layer stacks, pattern compositions, mini code blocks, or check results.

filled.description: Cards with vibrant gradient backgrounds instead of border strokes. Each card has a rich gradient (135deg) using the accent color. Text is white or dark depending on the gradient. Number badge has a dark semi-transparent background. Same grid layout and slot structure as outlined.

horizontal.description: Horizontal scrolling row of pipeline cards instead of a grid. Cards are fixed-width and scroll horizontally with snap points. Useful for longer pipelines that would otherwise require too many grid rows. Uses outlined card style with colored borders.

slots.step-number: Badge circle with accent-colored background, monospace number, _rounded[50%] _w8 _h8
slots.step-name: Step heading colored to match card accent
slots.step-visual: Optional inner content block with tinted background

slots.step-number: Numbered badge circle with accent color
slots.step-visual: Optional visual content inside the card
